privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for oracle_sql_developer_env aviation_safety_text_mining task by verifying that the data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh SQL inserts. Confirmed that all requested schema object names (IDX_ASRS_NARRATIVE, DRONE_LASER_THREATS_VW, EXTRACTED_ALTITUDES_MV, PROC_SYNC_TEXT_INDEX), expected output path (/home/ga/Documents/exports/threat_reports.csv), and required stopwords (AIRCRAFT, FLIGHT, RUNWAY) exactly match the explicit task instructions and export_result.sh queries. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
